type_types:User.docs: User object similar to Auth0 users

type_types:PaginatedUserResponse.docs: Response with pagination info like Auth0

properties.name: strategy
properties.docs: The identity provider identifier (auth0, google-oauth2, facebook, etc.)

properties.name: enabled_clients
properties.docs: List of client IDs that can use this connection

properties.name: is_domain_connection
properties.docs: Whether this is a domain connection

properties.name: description
properties.docs: Free text description of the client

properties.name: global
properties.docs: Whether this is a global client

properties.name: client_secret
properties.docs: The client secret (only for non-public clients)

properties.name: app_type
properties.docs: The type of application (spa, native, regular_web, non_interactive)

properties.name: is_first_party
properties.docs: Whether this client is a first party client

properties.name: oidc_conformant
properties.docs: Whether this client conforms to OIDC specifications

properties.name: custom_login_page_on
properties.docs: Whether a custom login page is enabled

properties.name: is_heroku_app
properties.docs: Whether this is a Heroku application

properties.name: token_endpoint_auth_method
properties.docs: Requested authentication method for the token endpoint

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include

queryParameters.name: page
queryParameters.docs: Page index of the results to return. First page is 0.

queryParameters.name: include_totals
queryParameters.docs: Return results inside an object that contains the total result count (true) or as a direct array of results (false, default).

queryParameters.name: sort
queryParameters.docs: Field to sort by. Use field:order where order is 1 for ascending and -1 for descending.

queryParameters.name: q
queryParameters.docs: Query string following Lucene query string syntax

queryParameters.name: search_engine
queryParameters.docs: Search engine version (v1, v2, or v3)

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include or exclude

value.docs: Returns either PaginatedUserResponse (if include_totals=true) or list<User> (if include_totals=false)

response.docs: Returns either PaginatedUserResponse (if include_totals=true) or list<User> (if include_totals=false)

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include or exclude

queryParameters.name: include_fields
queryParameters.docs: true to include the fields specified, false to exclude them

queryParameters.name: strategy
queryParameters.docs: Filter by strategy type (e.g., auth0, google-oauth2, samlp)

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include

queryParameters.name: include_fields
queryParameters.docs: Whether specified fields are included or excluded

queryParameters.name: app_type
queryParameters.docs: Filter by application type (spa, native, regular_web, non_interactive)

queryParameters.name: fields
queryParameters.docs: Comma-separated list of fields to include

queryParameters.name: include_fields
queryParameters.docs: Whether specified fields are included or excluded
